NAVAREA XIX 37/19
NORWEGIAN SEA

LIVE MISSILE FIRING WILL TAKE PLACE IN NORDMELA SHOOTING RANGE WEST OF ANDOYA IN THE PERIOD FROM MAY 8TH AND MAY 11TH. THE FIRING WILL BE CONDUCTED BETWEEN 1400-2000 LOCAL TIME, IN THE ANNOUNCED PERIOD.MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING HAZARD AREA:

HAZARD AREA: ONE AREA DEFINED BY THE FOLLOWING COORDINATES (DDMM.MM):

AREA 1: SOELVPILEN:
1. 6901.5N - 01529.4E
2. 6903.3N - 01432.0E
3. 6929.0N - 01432.0E
4. 6929.0N - 01545.3E
5. 6911.4N - 01549.4E
6. 6901.5N - 01529.4E
SEE WWW.TESTCENTER.NO FOR DAILY UPDATES AND MAPS
